---
title: "bal to genetic load"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-10-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

genetic load in balancing selection regions vs. genome-wide background in sorghum using zero-shot scores (ZSS)

#        1%        5%       10%       25%
-7.016113 -5.150879 -3.637695 -1.095825

```{r}
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(data.table); library(ggplot2) })

# ---------------- Inputs ----------------
ZSS_BED <- "/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/1.genetic_load/zeroscore.bed"
#B2_BED  <- "/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/3.input/wild/wild.top1.ext5k.bed"
#B2_BED  <- "/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/3.results/B2/land.top1.ext5k.bed"
B2_BED  <- "/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/3.input/imp/imp.top1.ext5k.bed"
OUTDIR  <- "/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/out_raw_full/wildtesting"
#GROUP   <- "WILD"
#GROUP   <- "landrace"
GROUP   <- "improved"

# ZSS cutoffs (named)
cuts <- c("1%"=-7.016113, "5%"=-5.150879, "10%"=-3.637695, "25%"=-1.095825)

dir.create(OUTDIR, showWarnings=FALSE, recursive=TRUE)

to_num_chr <- function(x){
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- sub("^chr","",x,ignore.case=TRUE)
  x <- sub("^Chr","",x,ignore.case=TRUE)
  x <- sub("^0+","",x)
  x[nchar(x)==0] <- "0"
  x
}
p_to_stars <- function(p){
  if (is.na(p)) "ns"
  else if (p < 1e-4) "****"
  else if (p < 1e-3) "***"
  else if (p < 1e-2) "**"
  else if (p < 5e-2) "*"
  else "ns"
}

# ---------------- Read once ----------------
Zraw <- fread(ZSS_BED, header=FALSE); stopifnot(ncol(Zraw) >= 5)
setnames(Zraw, paste0("V", seq_len(ncol(Zraw))))
Z_all <- Zraw[, .(chr=to_num_chr(V1), pos=as.integer(V4), zss=as.numeric(V5))]
Z_all <- Z_all[!is.na(chr) & !is.na(pos) & !is.na(zss)]
setkey(Z_all, chr, pos)

B2r <- fread(B2_BED, header=FALSE)
B2  <- B2r[, .(chr=to_num_chr(V1), start=as.integer(V2), end=as.integer(V3))]
B2  <- B2[!is.na(chr) & !is.na(start) & !is.na(end)]
# If B2 is BED 0-based half-open, uncomment the next line:
# B2[, start := start + 1L]  # convert to 1-based closed for foverlaps
setkey(B2, chr, start, end)

# ---------------- Per-cutoff function ----------------
make_plot_A <- function(cut_label, cutoff){
  Z <- Z_all[zss <= cutoff]
  if (nrow(Z) < 2L) {
    message(sprintf("[%s] Too few sites after cutoff %.6f; skipping.", cut_label, cutoff))
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  # Overlap: tag PEAK/BACKGROUND
  Zrng <- Z[, .(chr, start=pos, end=pos, pos, zss)]
  setkey(Zrng, chr, start, end)
  ov <- foverlaps(Zrng, B2, nomatch=0L)
  Z[, region := "BACKGROUND"]
  if (nrow(ov)) Z[pos %in% ov$pos, region := "PEAK"]
  Z[, region := factor(region, levels=c("BACKGROUND","PEAK"))]
  Z[, zss_val := zss]

  # Wilcoxon (PEAK expected lower than BG)
  if (any(Z$region=="PEAK") && any(Z$region=="BACKGROUND")) {
    wcx <- wilcox.test(Z[region=="PEAK", zss_val],
                       Z[region=="BACKGROUND", zss_val],
                       alternative="less")
    pval <- wcx$p.value
  } else {
    pval <- NA_real_
  }
  stars <- p_to_stars(pval)

  # axis zoom + bracket placement
  q <- quantile(Z$zss_val, c(0.01, 0.99), na.rm=TRUE)
  ylims <- c(q[1], q[2])
  if (!is.finite(ylims[1]) || !is.finite(ylims[2]) || ylims[1] == ylims[2]) {
    # fallback if too few unique values
    ylims <- range(Z$zss_val, na.rm=TRUE)
  }
  span <- diff(ylims)
  ybar <- ylims[2] - 0.05*span

  # Plot A
  pdfA <- file.path(
    OUTDIR,
    sprintf("%s_B2_peak_bg_rawZSS_box_%s.pdf", GROUP, gsub("%","pct",cut_label))
  )

  pA <- ggplot(Z, aes(region, zss_val, fill = region)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, color = "grey20") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = ylims) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.06))) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(BACKGROUND="grey75", PEAK="#f7a600")) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = sprintf("%s:cutoff %s)",
                      GROUP, cut_label, ifelse(is.na(pval), NA, pval)),
      y = "zero shot score",
      x = NULL
    ) +
    # bracket + stars
    annotate("text", x=1.5, y=ybar + 0.03*span, label=stars, vjust=0) +
    theme(legend.position="none")

  ggsave(pdfA, pA, width=4.6, height=4.6, useDingbats=FALSE)
  message(sprintf("[%s] Wrote: %s", cut_label, pdfA))
}

# ---------------- Run for the four thresholds ----------------
invisible(mapply(make_plot_A, names(cuts), unname(cuts)))

```



#combined plot



```{r}
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(data.table); library(ggplot2) })

## ====== Inputs ======
ZSS_BED <- "/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/1.genetic_load/zeroscore.bed"
B2_files <- list(
  wild     = "/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/3.input/wild/wild.top1.ext5k.bed",
  landrace = "/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/3.results/B2/land.top1.ext5k.bed",
  improved = "/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/3.input/imp/imp.top1.ext5k.bed"
)
# Only 1%, 5%, 10%
cuts <- c("1%"=-7.016113, "5%"=-5.150879, "10%"=-3.637695)

OUTDIR <- "/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/out_raw_full/combined_balancing"
dir.create(OUTDIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## ====== Helpers ======
to_num_chr <- function(x){
  x <- sub("^chr|^Chr","",as.character(x))
  x <- sub("^0+","",x); x[nchar(x)==0] <- "0"; x
}
p_to_stars <- function(p){
  if (is.na(p)) "ns" else if (p < 1e-4) "****" else if (p < 1e-3) "***"
  else if (p < 1e-2) "**" else if (p < 5e-2) "*" else "ns"
}

## Split-violin geom (left/right halves)
GeomSplitViolin <- ggplot2::ggproto("GeomSplitViolin", ggplot2::GeomViolin,
  draw_group = function(self, data, ..., draw_quantiles = NULL){
    data <- transform(data, xminv = x - violinwidth * (x - xmin),
                            xmaxv = x + violinwidth * (xmax - x))
    grp <- ifelse(data$group %% 2 == 1L, 1, -1)
    data$x <- ifelse(grp == 1, data$xminv, data$xmaxv)
    ggplot2:::ggname("geom_split_violin",
      grid::polygonGrob(data$x, data$y,
        gp = grid::gpar(
          col  = data$colour,
          fill = scales::alpha(data$fill, data$alpha),
          lwd  = data$size)))
  })
geom_split_violin <- function(mapping = NULL, data = NULL, stat = "ydensity",
                              position = "identity", ..., draw_quantiles = NULL,
                              trim = TRUE, scale = "area", na.rm = FALSE,
                              show.legend = NA, inherit.aes = TRUE){
  ggplot2::layer(data = data, mapping = mapping, stat = stat, geom = GeomSplitViolin,
    position = position, show.legend = show.legend, inherit.aes = inherit.aes,
    params = list(trim = trim, scale = scale, draw_quantiles = draw_quantiles, na.rm = na.rm, ...))
}

## ====== Load ZSS ======
Zraw <- fread(ZSS_BED, header = FALSE)
Z_all <- Zraw[, .(chr = to_num_chr(V1), pos = as.integer(V4), zss = as.numeric(V5))]
setkey(Z_all, chr, pos)

## ====== Build combined table (all groups × cutoffs) ======
# drop missing BEDs gracefully
ok <- vapply(B2_files, file.exists, logical(1))
if (!all(ok)) {
  message("Skipping missing files: ", paste(names(B2_files)[!ok], collapse=", "))
  B2_files <- B2_files[ok]
}
stopifnot(length(B2_files) > 0)

pieces <- list()
for (GROUP in names(B2_files)){
  B2r <- fread(B2_files[[GROUP]], header = FALSE)
  B2  <- B2r[, .(chr = to_num_chr(V1), start = as.integer(V2), end = as.integer(V3))]
  # If your B2 BED is 0-based half-open, uncomment:
  # B2[, start := start + 1L]
  setkey(B2, chr, start, end)

  for (cut_label in names(cuts)){
    cutoff <- cuts[[cut_label]]
    Z <- Z_all[zss <= cutoff]
    if (nrow(Z) < 2) next

    Zrng <- Z[, .(chr, start = pos, end = pos, pos, zss)]
    setkey(Zrng, chr, start, end)
    ov <- foverlaps(Zrng, B2, nomatch = 0L)

    Z[, region := "BACKGROUND"]
    if (nrow(ov)) Z[pos %in% ov$pos, region := "PEAK"]

    # one-sided Wilcoxon: PEAK < BG (more negative in peaks)
    pval <- if (any(Z$region=="PEAK") && any(Z$region=="BACKGROUND"))
              wilcox.test(Z[region=="PEAK", zss],
                          Z[region=="BACKGROUND", zss],
                          alternative="less")$p.value else NA_real_

    Z[, `:=`(GROUP = GROUP, CUTOFF = cut_label, pval = pval, stars = p_to_stars(pval))]
    pieces[[paste(GROUP, cut_label, sep="_")]] <- Z
  }
}
df <- rbindlist(pieces, fill=TRUE)
stopifnot(nrow(df) > 0)

## ====== One x-position per cutoff•population ======
## ---------- Labels & helpers ----------
cuts_levels  <- c("1%","5%","10%")
group_levels <- c("wild","landrace","improved")
id_levels    <- as.vector(outer(cuts_levels, group_levels, paste, sep=" • "))

df[, id    := factor(paste(CUTOFF, GROUP, sep=" • "), levels = id_levels)]
df[, xnum  := as.numeric(id)]
df[, region := factor(region, levels = c("BACKGROUND","PEAK"))]

# Stars + label height per split
summ <- df[, .(
  y_max = quantile(zss, 0.995, na.rm=TRUE),
  stars = {
    if (any(region=="PEAK") && any(region=="BACKGROUND")) {
      p <- wilcox.test(zss[region=="PEAK"], zss[region=="BACKGROUND"], alternative="less")$p.value
      if (is.na(p)) "ns" else if (p < 1e-4) "****" else if (p < 1e-3) "***" else if (p < 1e-2) "**" else if (p < .05) "*" else "ns"
    } else "ns"
  }
), by = id]

# faint bands to group by cutoff (each block has 3 populations)
band_df <- data.table(
  xstart = c(0.5, 3.5, 6.5),
  xend   = c(3.5, 6.5, 9.5),
  fill   = c("#00000008", "#00000000", "#00000008")
)

# population headings centered at each 3-panel block
pop_labels <- data.table(
  x = c(2, 5, 8),
  pop = c("wild", "landrace", "improved")
)

# vertical headroom for stars / headings
y_top   <- max(summ$y_max, na.rm=TRUE)
y_head  <- y_top + 0.3  # room for stars
y_title <- y_top + 0.75 # room for headings

reg_cols <- c(BACKGROUND = "#7f8c8d", PEAK = "#b2182b")

## ---------- PLOT ----------
p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = id, y = zss)) +
  # cutoff bands
  geom_rect(data = band_df, inherit.aes = FALSE,
            aes(xmin = xstart, xmax = xend, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf),
            fill = band_df$fill, color = NA) +

  # split violins
  geom_split_violin(aes(fill = region), scale = "width", color = "black", size = 0.3, alpha = 0.90) +

  # narrow boxplots inside each half (nudged)
  geom_boxplot(
    data = df,
    aes(x = xnum + ifelse(region=="PEAK", +0.14, -0.14),
        y = zss, group = interaction(id, region), fill = region),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, width = 0.20, outlier.shape = NA,
    color = "black", alpha = 0.65, size = 0.3
  ) +

  # median dots on each half
  stat_summary(
    data = df,
    aes(x = xnum + ifelse(region=="PEAK", +0.14, -0.14),
        y = zss, color = region, group = interaction(id, region)),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, fun = median, geom = "point",
    size = 2.2, stroke = 0.6
  ) +

  # significance stars
  geom_text(data = summ, inherit.aes = FALSE,
            aes(x = id, y = y_head, label = stars),
            vjust = -0.2, size = 5) +

  # population headings above blocks
  geom_text(data = pop_labels, inherit.aes = FALSE,
            aes(x = x, y = y_title, label = pop),
            fontface = 2, size = 5) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = reg_cols) +
  scale_color_manual(values = reg_cols, guide = "none") +

  # x-axis: show only percentages, repeated per population block
  scale_x_discrete(labels = rep(c("1%","5%","10%"), times = length(group_levels))) +

  # tighten bottom space, leave a bit on top for labels
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.14))) +

  labs(x = NULL, y = "Zero-shot score (ZSS)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(vjust = 0.9),
    plot.margin = margin(6, 14, 2, 6)  # shrink bottom space
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")  # allow headings/stars above panel

ggsave(file.path(OUTDIR, "Balancing_ZSS_splitViolin_ONEPANEL_clean.tiff"),
       p, width = 16, height = 6, dpi = 600, compression = "lzw")
```

```{r}
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(data.table); library(ggplot2) })

## ====== Inputs ======
ZSS_BED <- "/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/1.genetic_load/zeroscore.bed"
B2_files <- list(
  wild     = "/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/3.input/wild/wild.top1.ext5k.bed",
  landrace = "/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/3.results/B2/land.top1.ext5k.bed",
  improved = "/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/3.input/imp/imp.top1.ext5k.bed"
)
cuts <- c("1%"=-7.016113, "5%"=-5.150879, "10%"=-3.637695)
OUTDIR <- "/work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/out_raw_full/combined_balancing"
dir.create(OUTDIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## ====== Helpers ======
to_num_chr <- function(x){
  x <- sub("^chr|^Chr","",as.character(x))
  x <- sub("^0+","",x); x[nchar(x)==0] <- "0"; x
}
p_to_stars <- function(p){
  if (is.na(p)) "ns" else if (p < 1e-4) "****" else if (p < 1e-3) "***"
  else if (p < 1e-2) "**" else if (p < 5e-2) "*" else "ns"
}

## Split-violin geom (left/right halves)
GeomSplitViolin <- ggplot2::ggproto("GeomSplitViolin", ggplot2::GeomViolin,
  draw_group = function(self, data, ..., draw_quantiles = NULL){
    data <- transform(data, xminv = x - violinwidth * (x - xmin),
                            xmaxv = x + violinwidth * (xmax - x))
    grp <- ifelse(data$group %% 2 == 1L, 1, -1)
    data$x <- ifelse(grp == 1, data$xminv, data$xmaxv)
    ggplot2:::ggname("geom_split_violin",
      grid::polygonGrob(data$x, data$y,
        gp = grid::gpar(
          col  = data$colour,
          fill = scales::alpha(data$fill, data$alpha),
          lwd  = data$size)))
  })
geom_split_violin <- function(mapping = NULL, data = NULL, stat = "ydensity",
                              position = "identity", ..., draw_quantiles = NULL,
                              trim = TRUE, scale = "area", na.rm = FALSE,
                              show.legend = NA, inherit.aes = TRUE){
  ggplot2::layer(data = data, mapping = mapping, stat = stat, geom = GeomSplitViolin,
    position = position, show.legend = show.legend, inherit.aes = inherit.aes,
    params = list(trim = trim, scale = scale, draw_quantiles = draw_quantiles, na.rm = na.rm, ...))
}

## ====== Load ZSS ======
Z_all <- fread(ZSS_BED, header = FALSE)[, .(
  chr = to_num_chr(V1), pos = as.integer(V4), zss = as.numeric(V5)
)]
setkey(Z_all, chr, pos)

## ====== Build combined table (all groups × cutoffs) ======
ok <- vapply(B2_files, file.exists, logical(1))
if (!all(ok)) {
  message("Skipping missing files: ", paste(names(B2_files)[!ok], collapse=", "))
  B2_files <- B2_files[ok]
}
stopifnot(length(B2_files) > 0)

pieces <- list()
for (GROUP in names(B2_files)){
  B2 <- fread(B2_files[[GROUP]], header=FALSE)[, .(
    chr = to_num_chr(V1), start = as.integer(V2), end = as.integer(V3)
  )]
  # If BED is 0-based half-open, uncomment:
  # B2[, start := start + 1L]
  setkey(B2, chr, start, end)

  for (lab in names(cuts)){
    cutv <- cuts[[lab]]
    Z <- Z_all[zss <= cutv]
    if (nrow(Z) < 2) next

    Zrng <- Z[, .(chr, start=pos, end=pos, pos, zss)]; setkey(Zrng, chr, start, end)
    ov <- foverlaps(Zrng, B2, nomatch=0L)

    Z[, region := "BACKGROUND"]
    if (nrow(ov)) Z[pos %in% ov$pos, region := "PEAK"]

    pval <- if (any(Z$region=="PEAK") && any(Z$region=="BACKGROUND"))
      wilcox.test(Z[region=="PEAK", zss], Z[region=="BACKGROUND", zss],
                  alternative="less")$p.value else NA_real_

    Z[, `:=`(GROUP = GROUP, CUTOFF = lab, stars = p_to_stars(pval))]
    pieces[[paste(GROUP, lab, sep="_")]] <- Z
  }
}
df <- rbindlist(pieces, fill=TRUE)
stopifnot(nrow(df) > 0)

## ====== One x-position per cutoff•population ======
cuts_levels  <- c("1%","5%","10%")
group_levels <- c("wild","landrace","improved")
id_levels    <- as.vector(outer(cuts_levels, group_levels, paste, sep=" • "))

df[, id    := factor(paste(CUTOFF, GROUP, sep=" • "), levels = id_levels)]
df[, xnum  := as.numeric(id)]
df[, region := factor(region, levels = c("BACKGROUND","PEAK"))]

## Stars per split & top label positions
summ <- df[, .(
  y_star = quantile(zss, 0.995, na.rm=TRUE) + 0.15,
  stars  = unique(stars)
), by = id]

## Shaded blocks per population
block_df <- data.table(
  xmin = c(0.5, 3.5, 6.5),
  xmax = c(3.5, 6.5, 9.5),
  fill = c("#00000007", "#00000000", "#00000007")
)

## Population headings (center of each 3-slot block)
pop_labels <- data.table(
  x = c(2, 5, 8),
  pop = c("wild", "landrace", "improved")
)

## ====== Plot styling ======
reg_cols <- c(BACKGROUND = "#7f8c8d", PEAK = "#f7a600")
y_bottom <- -12                     # clamp bottom to remove whitespace
y_top    <- max(df$zss, na.rm=TRUE) # auto top; room added via coord_cartesian

p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = id, y = zss)) +
  # subtle population blocks
  geom_rect(data = block_df, inherit.aes = FALSE,
            aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf),
            fill = block_df$fill, color = NA) +

  # split violins
  geom_split_violin(aes(fill = region), scale = "width",
                    color = "black", size = 0.3, alpha = 0.90) +

  # slim boxplots inside each half (nudged)
  geom_boxplot(
    data = df,
    aes(x = xnum + ifelse(region=="PEAK", +0.14, -0.14),
        y = zss, group = interaction(id, region), fill = region),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, width = 0.20, outlier.shape = NA,
    color = "black", alpha = 0.60, size = 0.3
  ) +

  # median dots on each half
  stat_summary(
    data = df,
    aes(x = xnum + ifelse(region=="PEAK", +0.14, -0.14),
        y = zss, color = region, group = interaction(id, region)),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, fun = median, geom = "point",
    size = 2.1, stroke = 0.6
  ) +

  # significance stars (one per split)
  geom_text(data = summ, inherit.aes = FALSE,
            aes(x = id, y = y_star, label = stars),
            size = 5) +

  # population headings, centered above each block
  annotate("text", x = pop_labels$x, y = y_top + 0.45,
           label = pop_labels$pop, fontface = 2, size = 5) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = reg_cols) +
  scale_color_manual(values = reg_cols, guide = "none") +

  # x-axis: show only percentages (repeat under each block)
  scale_x_discrete(labels = rep(c("1%","5%","10%"), times = length(group_levels))) +

  # clamp bottom to -12; small headroom on top for labels
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(y_bottom, y_top + 0.75), clip = "off") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))) +

  labs(x = NULL, y = "Zero-shot score (ZSS)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(vjust = 0.9),
    plot.margin = margin(6, 18, 4, 6)  # trims bottom/left; room on right for legend
  )

ggsave(file.path(OUTDIR, "Balancing_ZSS_splitViolin_ONEPANEL_clean_labels.tiff"),
       p, width = 16, height = 4, dpi = 600, compression = "lzw")

```
